verses.1: I love the LORD, because He hears My voice and my pleas.
verses.2: Because He has inclined His ear to me, Therefore I will call upon Him as long as I live.
verses.3: The snares of death encompassed me And the terrors of Sheol came upon me; I found distress and sorrow.
verses.4: Then I called upon the name of the LORD: “Please, LORD, save my life!”
verses.5: Gracious is the LORD, and righteous; Yes, our God is compassionate.
verses.6: The LORD watches over the simple; I was brought low, and He saved me.
verses.7: Return to your rest, my soul, For the LORD has dealt generously with you.
verses.8: For You have rescued my soul from death, My eyes from tears, And my feet from stumbling.
verses.9: I shall walk before the LORD In the land of the living.
verses.10: I believed when I said, “I am greatly afflicted.”
verses.11: I said in my alarm, “All people are liars.”
verses.12: What shall I repay to the LORD For all His benefits to me?
verses.13: I will lift up the cup of salvation, And call upon the name of the LORD.
verses.14: I will pay my vows to the LORD; May it be in the presence of all His people!
verses.15: Precious in the sight of the LORD Is the death of His godly ones.
verses.16: O LORD, I surely am Your slave, I am Your slave, the son of Your female slave, You have unfastened my restraints.
verses.17: I will offer You a sacrifice of thanksgiving, And call upon the name of the LORD.
verses.18: I will pay my vows to the LORD, May it be in the presence of all His people,
verses.19: In the courtyards of the LORD’S house, In the midst of you, Jerusalem! Praise the LORD!
